examples: That flunkey was in his master's good graces.
Why expect flunkey to do their jobs just because you pay them?
I was admitted by a gorgeous flunkey, and shown into a sumptuous room where a couple of elderly gentlemen were sitting.
These political and systemic differences may explain why one Blairite flunkey was heard to explain recently that in Europe there will be a set of third ways, not a single third way.
